positive: A neon-soaked cyberpunk cityscape scene viewed from a rainy street corner. High contrast, deep shadows, vibrant electric blues and magentas dominating the palette. Focus on intricate wiring, glowing signage, and futuristic vehicles, cinematic lighting, vaporwave aesthetic, detailed matte painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoon, childish, simple background
